home.lede: Discovery & verification controller ye Vortex peer-to-peer network.
home.fingerprintDesc: Pina iyi kiyi yeruzhinji mune yako Vortex mutengi. Yese mhinduro kubva kumutongi inosainwa nayo - kusawirirana kunoreva kuti mumwe munhu ari kukanganisa.
home.step2: Sarudza iyo Global network mode mune yekuseta wizard.
home.step3: Namata iyo controller URL (yakagadziriswa otomatiki kuburikidza ne SNS) kana yekupinda URL kubva pane ino saiti.
home.step4: Simbisa iyo pubkey muapp yako inoenderana nezvigunwe zviri pamusoro.
home.step5: Wakabatana. Zvese zvimwe (node ​​rondedzero, masiginicha) zvinobatwa otomatiki.
home.nodesDesc: Vese vakanyoreswa vezera, huremu hwavo, mamagumo, uye masosi ekusimbisa.
home.entriesDesc: Bootstrap URLs yevatengi venguva yekutanga - Cloudflare tunnels, Tor, IPFS, zvakananga.
home.mirrorsDesc: Alternative hosts anosevenzesa zvimwe chete izvi zvakasainwa kana paine censorship.
home.securityDesc: Kuparadzana kwakazara kwezvakasimbiswa necryptographically, izvo zvisiri, uye nei.

nodes.title: Registered nodes
nodes.lede: Wese wezera mutongi anoziva nezvazvo. Vatengi vanoverenga runyorwa urwu, simbisa siginicha, uye sarudza node yekubatanidza nayo zvichienderana nehuremu. Iyo nyowani yakavharwa node inowana huremu 1.0; stale kana asina kuvharwa nodes anoora akananga 0 saka traffic inoyerera kurarama, yakavimbika vezera chete.
nodes.legendDualD: Yakanyoreswa nemutongi UYE yakasimbiswa pa-cheni kuburikidza ne Solana. Zvapupu zviviri zvakazvimirira zvinosimbisa kodhi hashi.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Yakanyoreswa ne HTTP controller. Siginicha inoratidza kuti node ndeyayo kiyi yakavanzika, asi kuvimbika kwekodhi haina kusungirirwa pa-cheni.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Inozivikanwa kubva kune config file kana makuhwa. Haisati yasimbiswa. Bata nekuchenjerera - chero munhu anogona kushambadza pubkey kusvika humbowo hwasvika.

entries.title: Entry URLs
entries.lede: Mapoinzi ekutanga kune mutengi asina vezera rake parizvino. Imwe neimwe yekupinda URL inzira yekusvika nayo mutongi — kuburikidza ne Cloudflare mugero, Tor, IPFS gedhi, kana nzvimbo yakananga. Kopa chero ipi zvayo mune yako Vortex app pakutanga kuvhurwa.
entries.typeTunnelD: Yemahara *.trycloudflare.com kero. Hapana account inodiwa. URL inoshanduka kana mugero watangazve - bata senge ephemeral.
entries.typeTorD: .onion kero, inosvikika chete kuburikidza ne Tor. Censor-proof, inononoka. Inoda Tor mutengi kana bhiriji.
entries.typeIpfsD: Content-addressed kopi yeiyo static frontend. Inoshandiswa kubva kune chero IPFS gedhi - hapana sevha imwe chete yekuvhara.
entries.typeDirectD: Regular domain + TLS. Inokurumidza asi inovharika pa DNS/IP level.

mirrors.title: Mirror nzvimbo
mirrors.lede: Dzimwe nzvimbo dzinopa zvakasaina zvakafanana nesaiti ino. Inobatsira kana vortexx.sol yakavharwa pa DNS/ISP yako. Girazi rega rega rinotariswa nguva nenguva - iyo doti ine ruvara inoratidza yekupedzisira probe mhedzisiro.
mirrors.healthyD: Yakaongorora mukati memaminitsi mashanu apfuura ndokupindura zvakanaka. Safe kushandisa izvozvi. Kunonoka kunoratidzwa pakadhi.
mirrors.unreachableD: Kuongorora kwekupedzisira kwakundikana - kubatana kwakaramba, nguva yekupera, 5xx. Girazi rinogona kunge riri pasi, rakavharika, kana kuti rakaremerwa. Edza chinotevera.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .onion mirrors haigoni kuongororwa hutano pasina Tor proxy yemunharaunda. Mamiriro haazivikanwe - shandisa Tor browser kuti uedze.

security.title: Chengetedzo modhi
security.lede: Chaizvo izvo zvinonzi cryptographically verified, chii chisiri, uye kuti kiyi yega yega musystem inowana sei - kana kurasikirwa - kuvimba kwako. Verenga izvi usati wabatanidza vatengi vatsva kune controller iwe hauzvifambise iwe pachako.
security.treasurySub: Iyo Solana chikwama chinogamuchira mari yeprotocol (mari yekunyoresa kubva kumanode matsva + 20% yekucheka kwekutanga kunyoreswa) uye inogovera yasara semibairo kune vanoshanda vanoshanda. Chero ani zvake anogona kuongorora zvinopinda/zvinobuda pa-cheni.
security.treasury1: On-chain transparency — kero iri pamusoro ndiye muridzi we vortexx.sol pa Solana Name Service. Chese chinopinda (mubhadharo wekunyoresa, kunyoreswa) uye mubhadharo wega wega wemubairo wakasainwa Solana kutengeserana - kunoongororwa nemunhu wese, kusanganisira newe.
security.treasury2: Kupatsanurwa kwemubhadharo - 70% yekunyoreswa kwega kwega kweprimiyamu inoenda kudziva remibairo (yakagoverwa pro-rata kumanodhi nekushandisa + danda), 20% mari yekusimudzira, 10% inopiswa / inobatwa seinishuwarenzi. Kunyoresa mubhadharo anchor node identity uye anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Custody caveat - kudzamara kondirakiti yekubhadhara yaiswa, treasury inoshanda semuchengeti wenguva pfupi. Izvi zvakanyorwa zvakatendeseka pano uye zvinotevedzwa pachena. Kondirakiti yakangwara ichatsiva kuchengetwa kwebhuku kamwe kadhidhi + pane-cheni yekutonga nyika.
security.wrongTitle: 6. Kana chimwe chinhu chinoratidzika kunge chisina kunaka
